typography.installation: Imports via Google Fonts or generic fallbacks provided in CSS.

rules: Backgrounds are never pure black (#000000), use Obsidian (#050505).
Primary blue is used strictly for Actions and Active States.
Text is never pure white (#FFFFFF) unless it is a Heading. Body text is #A1A1AA.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on backgrounds to prevent banding.

layout_strategies.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for lists.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold hover:bg-blue-400 transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-sm p-6 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-surface border border-white/5 rounded-sm p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-surface_highlight border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm placeholder:text-gray-600 text-white h-12

universal_guidelines: Dark Mode Only: Ensure 'dark' class is always applied to html/body.
No AI Slop: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Data Density: In dashboards, use tight spacing for data, but wide spacing for layout sections.
Terminal Aesthetic: Use JetBrains Mono for numbers, dates, and 'system' messages.
Call Bhaiya Mode: Must be full screen, immersive, with no distracting UI elements. Just the avatar/waveform and essential controls.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Bhaiya' interface as a high-fidelity dashboard. Focus on the 'Call Bhaiya' and 'Chat' features being seamless. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Ensure strict adherence to the color palette - no purples.
